name: ui-spec
description: From a business DOCX + PNG mockups + the owner's specs/<module>/02-requirements, produce a DETAILED specs/<module>/03-ui.md mapping every UI element to REUSE / EXTEND / CREATE-NEW — maximizing reuse of existing FE components/UI/logic/patterns (CodeGraph + component/reuse catalogs + warehouse exemplar + shadcn). Multimodal mockup-read; read-only on source code; the foundation/input of the FE dev workflow (mh-implement FE-mode). Never authors schema or business rules.
